steps.expected: Page loads with search button visible
steps.observed: Page loaded with 'Search... ⌘ K' button visible at ref=e10

steps.expected: Search palette opens with input focused
steps.observed: Search palette opened showing textbox 'Search lectures, examples, instructions, concepts...'

assertions.title: Search finds lectures, examples, and concepts

steps.expected: Search palette with input field displayed
steps.observed: Search palette displayed with input field

steps.action: Press arrow down to trigger search
steps.expected: Results shown for lectures, examples, concepts
steps.observed: Lecture results displayed (e.g., '1 Introduction to Assembly Language', '4 Data Transfer and Arithmetic Instructions MOV, XCHG, LEA instructions')

assertions.title: Keyboard navigation in results

steps.observed: Results changed from homepage links to lecture cards
Page remained on homepage - no navigation occurred

assertions.issues: Enter key does not select highlighted search result. Keyboard selection appears broken.

assertions.title: Recent searches shown
assertions.issues: Could not test due to search interface navigation instability - typing in search box caused page navigation away from homepage

assertions.title: Search closes on Escape or outside click
assertions.issues: Could not test properly - the search palette behavior was inconsistent, sometimes closing immediately after opening due to underlying navigation issues

steps.observed: Hamburger button visible at ref=e1, navigation links replaced by lecture cards
Lecture cards displayed in single column vertical layout

assertions.title: Consistent spacing on all screen sizes
No horizontal scroll at any viewport

frictions.description: Keyboard typing in search box triggered page navigation instead of filling the search input - typing 'MOV' caused the page to navigate to Examples page
frictions.resolution: Worked around by using arrow keys to navigate search results

frictions.description: agent-browser 'fill' and 'type' commands timed out when trying to fill the search textbox - had to use keyboard type instead

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 6 passed (P2-SEARCH-001, P2-SEARCH-002, P2-RESP-001, P2-RESP-002, P2-RESP-003, P2-RESP-004), 1 failed (P2-SEARCH-003: Enter key selection broken), 2 skipped (P2-SEARCH-004, P2-SEARCH-005 due to search interface instability). Responsive layout tests all passed - sidebar collapses on mobile, touch targets are 44x44px, no horizontal scroll at any viewport.
